description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the openjdk:8 Docker image and runs a before_script that updates apt and installs openjfx and ant. Define two jobs in the default test stage: a build_client job that executes `cd client` then `ant -buildfile ant-build.xml build package` and stores the resulting client/jar/ directory as an artifact, and a build_mdt job that executes `cd forteso-mdt` then `ant -buildfile ant-build.xml build package` and stores forteso-mdt/jar/ as an artifact. No caches, services, or conditional rules are defined, and the pipeline does not deploy anywhere.
